workflowScenarioSmokePrereq0: A saved scenario with Download → Process → Save blocks.
workflowScenarioSmokePrereq1: A local media file for «Run scenario» from the editor.
workflowScenarioSmokePrereq2: (Optional) A URL for «Run URL scenario» (sourceUrl on the Download block).
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_open_builder: Service → Scenario builder: flow diagram, JSON, «Validate» succeeds.
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_add_link: «Add» a block, drag to reorder, link with dots — edges appear in JSON.
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_save: «Save» — scenario in the list; reopening the builder shows the same nodes/edges.
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_editor_run: Editor → FFmpeg rail → «Run scenario» on the open file — workflowScenario in processing history.
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_url_run: (Optional) «Run URL scenario» — yt-dlp, then ffmpeg (no auto-open in the editor).
workflowScenarioSmokeStep_planner: (Optional) Watch-folder + «Run scenario» — see the OS scheduler checklist.
workflowScenarioSmokePass0: Removing a block with × does not leave dangling edges in JSON.
workflowScenarioSmokePass1: Repeat scenario from processing history enqueues the job again.
workflowScenarioSmokePass2: Help «Planner and scenarios» opens from the builder (deep-link).
